issues.title: Define transactional/degraded contract for execution rows when local receipt persistence fails

tasks.text: Define transactional/degraded contract for execution rows when local receipt persistence fails (task #268)

issues.dod: Task reaches done in society.db with evidence recorded.
issues.note:
Deferred:
- reason: Current pass now surfaces receipt-persist failure as degraded, but eliminating execution-row/receipt divergence needs a broader execution-finalization design (transactional insert vs compensating cleanup) beyond this atomic package pass. Deadline 2026-04-05. Blast radius if forgotten: vault_executions, replay, and feedback can still observe execution rows without local receipts when every sink fails.
- kind: until_decision
- trigger_ref: decision:pi-vault-client-execution-finalization-contract
- review_at: 2026-04-05T17:00:00Z

issues.title: Replace caller-supplied company filtering in runtime-registry receipt accessors with authenticated execution-context contract

tasks.text: Replace caller-supplied company filtering in runtime-registry receipt accessors with authenticated execution-context contract (task #269)

issues.dod: Task reaches done in society.db with evidence recorded.
issues.note:
Deferred:
- reason: Current pass fixed local telemetry and partial-result truth, but registry receipt access still relies on caller-supplied company filtering. A real fix needs an authenticated cross-extension execution-context contract or registry-level caller identity model beyond this package-local slice. Deadline 2026-04-05. Blast radius if forgotten: another extension could treat registry receipt access as a stronger visibility boundary than it really is.
- kind: until_decision
- trigger_ref: decision:pi-vault-client-runtime-registry-context-auth
- review_at: 2026-04-05T17:00:00Z
